A vádirat szerint séta közben különös kegyetlenséggel bántalmazta a gyereket, aki néhány percen belül meghalt.

The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.

TechCrunch.title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
TechCrunch.summary: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.

Mathematical texts from a Maya site in Guatemala identify an astronomer called Sak Tahn Waax.

Nature.title: RNA molecules with different destinies are processed through overlapping pathways
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 14 July 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-02041-2

The protein complex that helps messenger RNA to leave the nucleus is remarkably similar to the one that facilitates the destruction of short, unwanted transcripts.
